# R3Events – Copilot Instructions

R3Events is a **Roslyn Incremental Source Generator** that bridges .NET events with R3 Observable.

## Available Skills

Use these skills when working in this repository:

| Skill | When to use |
|---|---|
| `dotnet10` | Looking up C# 14 / .NET 10 new features (`partial event`, extension members, field-backed properties, etc.) |
| `csharp-mstest` | Writing or reviewing MSTest unit tests (assertion APIs, data-driven tests, lifecycle) |

## Key Conventions

- **All code changes**: Follow `github-flow.instructions.md` — Conventional Commits, Draft PR, Squash Merge
- **C# code**: See `.github/instructions/csharp.instructions.md`
- **Source generator code** (`src/main/R3EventsGenerator/`): See `.github/instructions/generator.instructions.md`
- **CI/CD workflows**: See `.github/instructions/github-actions-ci-cd-best-practices.instructions.md`
- **Project structure & design decisions**: See `.github/instructions/project-context.instructions.md`
